revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11
  |december|dec=12
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<0
   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11
  |december|dec=12
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<0
   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11
  |december|dec=12
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<0
   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing all the coordinates module stuff with the timestamps removed in order to force updates
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11
  |december|dec=12
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<0
   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1

  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10

    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1

   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting to fix errors
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11
  |december|dec=12
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<0
   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11

    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11
  |december|dec=12
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<0
   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
[[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11
  |december|dec=12
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<0
   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
[[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]]
[[Category:Date-computing templates]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}

   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11
  |december|dec=12
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<0
   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}

  |march|mar=3

  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!

<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}

</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11
  |december|dec=12
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<0
   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11
  |december|dec=12
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<0
   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11
  |december|dec=12
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<0
   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8

    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11
  |december|dec=12
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<0
   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11

   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

</noinclude>

 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1

    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{1|}}}
 |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#switch:{{safesubst:<noinclude/>lc:{{{1}}}}}
  |january|jan=1
  |february|feb=2
  |march|mar=3
  |apr|april=4
  |may=5
  |june|jun=6
  |july|jul=7
  |august|aug=8
  |september|sep|sept=9
  |october|oct=10
  |november|nov=11
  |december|dec=12
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<0
   |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifexpr:(({{{1}}})round 0)!=({{{1}}})
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((0.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
    |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:12-(((11.5-({{{1}}}))round 0)mod 12)}}
   }}
  |{{safesubst:<noinclude/>#expr:(((10.5+{{{1}}})round 0)mod 12)+1}}
  }}
 }}
 |Missing required parameter 1=''month''!
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}

</noinclude>
